title: andrographis lobelioides
intro: Andrographis lobelioides, also known as Himalayan king of bitters or Himalayan lemongrass, is a perennial plant species native to the Himalayan region. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and boosting the immune system. Andrographis lobelioides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is also available in capsule or powder form for oral consumption.
